summary: Comprehensive UI testing of DERIS custom apparel site (React-only, no backend). All 7 routes load, all critical user flows verified: navigation, header/mobile menu, Hero CTAs, products + category filters, Size Chart Google Drive link, Designer canvas (depan/belakang toggle, 6 color presets, add text, drag-and-drop overlay movement verified by bounding-box delta, edit text/font/size, send-to-WA), Portfolio Telkom University clients, FAQ accordion expand, Contact form -> wa.me link. All WhatsApp buttons resolve to wa.me/6283123453430. No console errors detected.

issues: Drag handlers use global window pointermove/pointerup listeners attached on pointerdown but use stale closures referencing items/setItems via captured side state. Currently works because setItems uses functional update inside onPointerMove. No active bug, but if 'side' is switched mid-drag, handlers continue updating previous side. Edge case only.
SVG mockup is identical for 'front' and 'back' except for dashed front-opening line. Acceptable for MVP but could be visually richer to distinguish back view.

critical_code_review_comments: Designer.jsx onPointerMove/onPointerUp are attached to window but defined as fresh arrow functions per pointerdown; cleanup uses removeEventListener with the same reference within that closure, which works only because both are defined in component scope referencing same identifier. Minor: consider AbortController for robustness.
FileReader result in uploadLogo embeds full base64 image into state and ultimately into wa.me message via JSON-like summary (only label, fine). Memory ok for typical logos.
All env usage correct (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL not used since static site).
data-testid coverage is excellent across all interactive elements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site is a pure static React app at https://jaket-komunitas.preview.emergentagent.com. All 7 routes (/, /about, /products, /design, /portfolio, /faq, /contact) verified. Designer drag-and-drop confirmed working with bounding-box delta. Use data-testids: preset-{hitam|maroon|navy|crimson|forest|cream}, side-front-btn, side-back-btn, new-text-input, add-text-btn, upload-logo-label, design-canvas, overlay-{id}, edit-text/font/color/size, delete-element-btn, send-design-btn, contact-name/org/qty/note/submit, filter-{semua|jaket|hoodie|kaos|kemeja|headwear}, size-chart-btn, size-chart-cta, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu.
